reads.note: repo.watchReminders() streams List<(Reminder, DebtView)> — each Reminder row joined to its debt (and via debt to its customer) by debtId; rows whose debt is missing are dropped. The Reminder drift row itself has NO message column (reminder message text is composed at runtime in send_reminder from debt+business, not persisted here). Card renders customer.name, debt.remaining (money), channel glyph/label, and a status line.

fields.name: debtId
fields.note: FK -> Debts.id; join key to DebtView (debt.customer supplies customer name/avatar)

fields.name: channel
fields.note: as-built enum is sms|whatsapp|call; convention channel domain is sms|whatsapp|manual|printable (call == manual, recorded-history only). UI maps whatsapp->WhatsApp, call->Call, else SMS

fields.name: scheduledFor
fields.note: scheduled tab shows 'Sends <date> <time>' or 'Sends on due date' when null; failed tab uses it for 'Failed <relative>'

fields.name: sentAt
fields.note: sent tab shows 'Delivered <relative>' (dereferenced non-null for sent rows)

fields.name: payLinkUrl
fields.note: Paystack seam — debtor pay-link embedded in the reminder message; regenerated on retry

filtersOrSort: sort: ORDER BY id DESC (newest first)
filter: status == selected tab (scheduled | sent | failed) — client-side over the full stream; default tab = scheduled
implicit filter: only reminders whose debt still exists are shown (inner-join on debtId)

actions.name: retryReminder
actions.note: Shown only on failed rows ('Retry' pill). As-built it is a full re-send: mints a fresh Paystack pay-link, flips status->sent, sets sentAt=now, updates debt.lastReminderAt, marks rows pending, and writes a 'Reminder sent' notification. Takes the whole Reminder object; identity that matters is the reminder id (debtId derivable server-side).

authContext.note: No role gating in the screen itself. Per conventions reminders are core recovery (owner + staff both send/retry); tenant-scoped by businessId via the debt. sms/whatsapp automated sends are metered; call(manual)/printable are free/unmetered.

special.note: Live updates are local drift StreamBuilder, not a backend realtime channel. payLinkUrl ties into the Paystack pay-link seam.

uiStatesHandled: loading (snapshot has no data yet -> empty list, tabs still render)
populated (reminder cards grouped by selected status tab)
per-tab-empty (tab with no matching rows shows just the tab chips + primary button, no explicit message)
outOfScopeNotes: Primary 'Send reminder' button navigates to /reminders/send/:debtId (send-reminder screen) via pickOpenDebt; the send action itself belongs to that screen, not this one.
